task_completion.description: Navigate to the Add Leave Type form in Sentrifugo
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for adding a new leave type is visible in the Sentrifugo web interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the leave type name and code
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Bereavement Leave' is entered in the Leave Type name field, and 'BL' is entered in the Leave Code field.
The number '5' is entered in the Quota field, and 'Leave granted for the death of an immediate family member' is entered in the Description field.

task_completion.description: Set the pre-allocated and pre-deductible options
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Yes' option (or checkbox/radio button) is selected for Pre-allocated, and the 'No' option is selected for Pre-deductible.

task_completion.description: Save the leave type and verify its creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed indicating the leave type was added, or 'Bereavement Leave' is visible in the list of configured leave types.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Sentrifugo application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs are typed into the Sentrifugo web forms, rather than a text editor or separate document.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open, and the final list of leave types appears to be a genuine page load.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Leave Type Name: 'Bereavement Leave', Leave Code: 'BL', Quota: 5 days, Description: 'Leave granted for the death of an immediate family member', Pre-allocated: Yes, Pre-deductible: No.
